feed.title: ସତ୍ୟଜିତ ପୁହାଣ - Academia Sinica
feed.subtitle: ଅକ୍ଟୋବର ସିଣା, ତାଇଭାନର ଉଚ୍ଚଭୁମି ଭୂତବିଦ୍ଜ୍ଞାନ, QCD ଓ ହାଡ୍ରୋନିକ୍ ଫିଜିକ୍ସର ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞାସତ୍ଯଜିତ ପୁହାଣର ବ୍ଯକ୍ତିଗତ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ବେସଭୂମିହି (/Satyajit Puhan).

entry.title: EIC-Asia Workshop on QCD and Hadron Structure 2026 — Academia Sinica, Taipei
entry.summary:
Workshop: EIC-Asia Workshop on QCD and Hadron Structure

Venue: Institute of Physics, Academia Sinica, Taipei, Taiwan

Dates: April 29 – May 1, 2026

Mode: In person

I attended the EIC-Asia Workshop on QCD and Hadron Structure hosted at the Institute of Physics, Academia Sinica, Taipei. The workshop brought together experts in experiments, phenomenology, and lattice calculations relevant to the upcoming Electron-Ion Collider (EIC).

entry.title: 🚀 Starting a New Research Chapter in Taiwan — Academia Sinica
entry.summary:
I have joined the Academia Sinica as a Research Assistant at the Institute of Physics, working under the supervision of Prof. Wen-Chen Chang.

My work focuses on:

  • 🔹 Detector development for the ePIC experiment (Zero-Degree Calorimeter)
  • 🔹 Global analysis of pion and kaon Parton Distribution Functions (PDFs)
